strengths: Extensive Full Stack experience utilizing TypeScript, Node.js, and React in senior roles such as Optilyz and re:cinq.
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure, specifically mentioning MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Deep expertise in testing and software craftsmanship, evidenced by applying TDD at RIDE Capital and creating custom testing libraries.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are key components of the required primary stack.
Java experience is somewhat dated (last explicitly used at Altom Consulting in 2018) and Kotlin is completely absent from the resume.
History of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) in several past roles like RIDE Capital and Dunnhumby, though offset by long-term personal projects.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate who far exceeds the 6+ years of required experience, bringing deep expertise in the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His recent work at re:cinq directly aligns with the required AI agent development, and his background at Optilyz demonstrates solid cloud (AWS) and database capabilities. Furthermore, his profound dedication to software craftsmanship—evidenced by his TDD practice at RIDE Capital and creation of testing frameworks—ensures he will excel at writing clean, tested code, making him a highly recommended fit despite lacking explicit mentions of Nest.js or Vitest.
